_note: Blank schema for a STANDALONE invoice record (many per deal: deposits, partials, kill fees, final balances are separate invoices). Real invoices live in pipeline/finance/<invoice_id>.local.json (gitignored, invariant 19). invoice_id is deterministic (INV-<deal_id>-<seq:03d>), assigned by tools/finance.py, never by the model. Numbers come only from records and explicit inputs; a missing figure stays null with a gaps[] entry. terms_snapshot freezes the structured payment terms at issue time so later deal edits cannot silently change what an issued invoice means. Invoices are DRAFTED only; the human sends (consequential-action gate, shared/finance-engine.md).
_boundary: ARITHMETIC AND RESEARCH NOTES. NOT TAX, ACCOUNTING, OR INVESTMENT ADVICE. REVIEW WITH A CPA OR TAX PROFESSIONAL BEFORE FILING OR RELYING ON CATEGORIZATIONS.
